title: Protein extraction, alkylation, and digestion for LC/MS of HEK-293
author: Shun Adachi
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.h6gb9bw
materials: Quantify the proteins by using a Micro BCA Protein Assay Kit (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, U.S.A.).
Reduce the samples for 2 h at 37°C.
Trypsinize the resultant samples overnight at 35°C.
Quantify the amounts with the Pierce Quantitative Colorimetric Peptide Assay (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, U.S.A.).

steps.title: Wash approximately 10 6 harvested cells...
steps.instruction: Wash approximately 10 6 harvested cells once in Krebs-Ringer-Buffer (KRB; 154 mM NaCl, 5.6 mM KCl, 5.5 mM glucose, 20.1 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 25 mM NaHCO 3 ).

steps.title: Resuspend the cells in 30 µl...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cells in 30 µl of RIPA buffer (NACALAI, INC., Kyoto, Japan) , passed in and out through 21G needles for destruction, and incubate on ice for 1 h.

steps.title: Centrifuge the cells at 10,000 g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the cells at 10,000 g for 10 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Collect the supernatants
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatants.

steps.title: Solidify the samples in acrylamide gel
steps.instruction: Solidify the samples in acrylamide gel. For further steps, use XL-Tryp Kit Direct Digestion (APRO SCIENCE, Naruto, Japan).

steps.title: Wash the samples in ultrapure water
steps.instruction: Wash the samples in ultrapure water. (1/2)

steps.title: Wash the samples in ultrapure water
steps.instruction: Wash the samples in ultrapure water. (2/2)

steps.title: Wash the samples in dehydration solution
steps.instruction: Wash the samples in dehydration solution. (1/3)

steps.title: Wash the samples in dehydration solution
steps.instruction: Wash the samples in dehydration solution. (2/3)

steps.title: Wash the samples in dehydration solution
steps.instruction: Wash the samples in dehydration solution. (3/3)

steps.title: Dry the samples
steps.instruction: Dry the samples.

steps.title: Process the samples using an In-Gel...
steps.instruction: Process the samples using an In-Gel R-CAM Kit (APRO SCIENCE, Naruto, Japan).

steps.title: Alkylate the samples for 30 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Alkylate the samples for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash samples with ultrapure water
steps.instruction: Wash samples with ultrapure water. (1/5)

steps.title: Wash samples with ultrapure water
steps.instruction: Wash samples with ultrapure water. (2/5)

steps.title: Wash samples with ultrapure water
steps.instruction: Wash samples with ultrapure water. (3/5)

steps.title: Wash samples with ultrapure water
steps.instruction: Wash samples with ultrapure water. (4/5)

steps.title: Wash samples with ultrapure water
steps.instruction: Wash samples with ultrapure water. (5/5)

steps.title: Wash samples with destaining solution
steps.instruction: Wash samples with destaining solution. (1/2)

steps.title: Wash samples with destaining solution
steps.instruction: Wash samples with destaining solution. (2/2)

steps.title: Dry the samples
steps.instruction: Dry the samples.

steps.title: Collect the dissolved digested peptides by ZipTipC18 (Merck Millipore,Corp
steps.instruction: Collect the dissolved digested peptides by ZipTipC18 (Merck Millipore,Corp., Billerica, U.S.A.).

steps.title: Dampen the tips with acetonitrile x three tips
steps.instruction: Dampen the tips with acetonitrile x three tips. (1/2)

steps.title: Dampen the tips with acetonitrile x three tips
steps.instruction: Dampen the tips with acetonitrile x three tips. (2/2)

steps.title: Equilibrate tips with 0
steps.instruction: Equilibrate tips with 0.1% trifluoroacetic acid x three tips. (1/2)

steps.title: Equilibrate tips with 0
steps.instruction: Equilibrate tips with 0.1% trifluoroacetic acid x three tips. (2/2)

steps.title: Collect the peptides by ~20 cycles...
steps.instruction: Collect the peptides by ~20 cycles of aspiration and dispensing x three tips.

steps.title: Wash the peptides with 0
steps.instruction: Wash the peptides with 0.1% trifluoroacetic acidx three tips. (1/2)

steps.title: Wash the peptides with 0
steps.instruction: Wash the peptides with 0.1% trifluoroacetic acid x three tips. (2/2)

steps.title: Elute by 0
steps.instruction: Elute by 0.1% trifluoroacetic acid /50% acetonitrile with aspiration and dispense x three tips. (1/5)

steps.title: Elute by 0
steps.instruction: Elute by 0.1% trifluoroacetic acid /50% acetonitrile with aspiration and dispense x three tips. (2/5)

steps.title: Elute by 0
steps.instruction: Elute by 0.1% trifluoroacetic acid /50% acetonitrile with aspiration and dispense x three tips. (3/5)

steps.title: Elute by 0
steps.instruction: Elute by 0.1% trifluoroacetic acid /50% acetonitrile with aspiration and dispense x three tips. (4/5)

steps.title: Elute by 0
steps.instruction: Elute by 0.1% trifluoroacetic acid /50% acetonitrile with aspiration and dispense x three tips. (5/5)

steps.title: Store the finalized samples at −20°C
steps.instruction: Store the finalized samples at −20°C.

steps.title: Before performing LC/MS, resuspend samples in 0
steps.instruction: Before performing LC/MS, resuspend samples in 0.1% formic acid.
